semantic.role: Defines naming conventions and coding standards for the ArchSpine monorepo codebase.
responsibilities: Documenting interface naming rules (prefix 'I') for type definition files
Documenting test file suffix rules (.test.ts or .spec.ts) for test directories
Establishing severity levels (Warning, Error) for each rule
Providing rationale for each naming convention
outOfScope: General coding style beyond naming conventions
Project structure or directory layout outside of types and tests

English.purpose: This document establishes mandatory naming conventions to ensure consistency across the ArchSpine monorepo codebase, reducing cognitive overhead and preventing common mistakes.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for all developers contributing to the ArchSpine project, particularly those working with TypeScript type definitions and test files. The rules are designed to be enforceable by automated tooling.
key_takeaways: All internal interfaces in src/types/**/*.ts must use the 'I' prefix (e.g., IUserRepository).
All test files in tests/** must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts.
Violations of interface naming are warnings; test file naming violations are errors.
Consistent naming improves code readability and tool integration.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档规定了 ArchSpine monorepo 代码库中必须遵守的命名规范，以确保代码风格统一，降低认知负担并防止常见错误。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 适用于所有为 ArchSpine 项目贡献代码的开发者，特别是处理 TypeScript 类型定义和测试文件的开发者。这些规则设计为可通过自动化工具强制执行。
key_takeaways: src/types/**/*.ts 中的所有内部接口必须使用 'I' 前缀（例如 IUserRepository）。
tests/** 中的所有测试文件必须以 .test.ts 或 .spec.ts 结尾。
接口命名违规为警告级别；测试文件命名违规为错误级别。
一致的命名有助于提高代码可读性和工具集成度。
